profile.role_zh: 文学院副教授·创意写作课导师

profile.learned_en: 15 years of teaching; strong student empathy

profile.belief_en: Good education lights a fire, not fills a bucket

profile.fear_en: A life trapped on the promotion treadmill
profile.desire_zh: 写出真正有生命力的文字
profile.lifestyle_zh: 教学为主·科研见缝插针

profile.rhythm_en: Teach AM, research PM, family at night

profile.short_goal_en: Prepare this afternoon's creative-writing lesson plan

profile.constraint_en: Too many admin meetings; grant deadline near

profile.narrative_zh: 学生的一句'我想明白了'比任何奖项都值得
profile.narrative_en: A student's 'I get it now' beats any award
